metadata.description: Per-scene gold spatial relation-graphs with a DESCRIPTIVE multi-path-redundancy prevalence annotation (the spatial analog of the temporal a-priori N* gate). No closure, no LLM. datasets[] contains the 4 STANDARDIZED corpora; prevalence_table covers all 6 EVALUATED corpora (4 standardized + 2 evaluated extras).
metadata.schema_note: input=story text; output=JSON {nodes,edges,query_edge}; structural metrics also surfaced as metadata_* fields.
metadata.root_node_handling: world/image container id '-1' excluded from the primary structural graph (non-constraining containment).
metadata.note: DEMO SUBSET: 80 diverse SpaRP-PS1 (SpaRTUN) rows from the full 2316, stratified to preserve the rare genuine-multipath-with-bite signal. Full-corpus prevalence for this venue: 27.4% tight bite (general band).
